name: No-Egg Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sour milk (mix 1 tablespoon vinegar with 1 cup of milk)
1/2 cup Melted shortening or salad oil (e.g., canola oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients in the following order: flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, sour milk, melted shortening or oil, boiling water, and vanilla.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased tube pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 55-60 minutes, checking the cake between 50 and 60 minutes to ensure it is fully cooked.
5. Frost with confectionary white frosting infused with a hint of real coffee for an absolutely delicious finish.
